twelvelabs_people.description: Woman with short dark hair, wearing a black robe and a grey and white scarf, sitting at a desk and typing on a laptop.
Man with short brown hair, wearing a black robe, sitting at a desk and typing on a computer, then standing to greet visitors.
Man with short brown hair, wearing a light beige coat over a suit, entering the courtroom and greeting others.
Woman with short grey hair, wearing a plaid jacket, sitting at a table in the courtroom audience.
Man with grey hair, wearing a black jacket and headphones, operating a large professional video camera.
Woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a black sweater and a necklace, sitting at a table in the courtroom.
Man with short brown hair, wearing a dark pinstripe suit and a light tie, putting on a black robe in the courtroom.
Woman with short dark hair, wearing a black robe and a grey and white scarf, sitting at a desk and looking at a laptop.
Person with their head covered by a black jacket, being escorted up the stairs by police officers.
Person with their head covered by a black jacket, sitting at a desk in the courtroom.
Woman with blonde hair, wearing a black jacket, operating a video camera in the courtroom.
Woman with blonde hair, wearing a black robe, sitting at a desk and smiling.
Woman with blonde hair, wearing a black robe, sitting at a desk and looking at a computer.
Man with grey hair, wearing a black jacket, operating a large professional video camera.
Man with short brown hair, wearing a black robe, sitting at a desk and talking to someone.
Woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a black sweater, sitting at a table in the courtroom.
Woman with brown hair tied back, wearing a black jacket, taking a photo with a small camera.
Person with their head covered by a black jacket, standing at a desk in the courtroom.
Woman with blonde hair, wearing a black robe, sitting at a desk and raising her hand.
Man with short brown hair, wearing a light beige coat over a suit, being interviewed in a hallway.
Man with short brown hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit and a pink tie, being interviewed in a hallway.
Male police officer with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark uniform with 'POLIZEI' on the back, escorting a person.

scenes.description: A montage of still images from a courtroom setting, including lawyers, judges, and media personnel, displayed on a camera's playback screen.
A female lawyer in a black robe sits at a desk in a courtroom, typing on a laptop and looking around the room.
A male judge in a black robe sits at his desk, typing on a computer, then stands to greet a man and a woman who enter the courtroom.
The man and woman walk through the courtroom, passing media personnel, and shake hands with a female lawyer before taking their seats.
The camera pans across the audience seated in the courtroom, showing people looking at their phones and papers.
A close-up shot of two cameramen filming the proceedings in the courtroom.
A woman with blonde hair, wearing a black top and a necklace, sits in the courtroom looking concerned.
A man in a suit puts on a black lawyer's robe and sits down at a table in the courtroom.
The female lawyer from earlier is shown again, sitting at her desk and looking around the courtroom.
A person with their head covered by a black cloth is escorted up a staircase by two police officers.
The person with the covered head is escorted into the courtroom by police officers and approaches a desk.
The person with the covered head sits at a desk with their head down, while the female lawyer sits next to them.
Media personnel are shown filming and taking photos in the courtroom.
The female lawyer leans towards the person with the covered head, appearing to speak to them, while the person keeps their head down.
The camera shows the judges' bench, then pans back to the person with the covered head sitting at the desk.
Media personnel are shown again, followed by a shot of the female lawyer and the person with the covered head.
A male judge is shown speaking to someone off-camera while looking at his computer screen.
The camera focuses on the woman with blonde hair from earlier, who is now sitting at a table with a man.
The female lawyer is shown looking at a red folder and then looking around the courtroom.
The camera shows the woman with blonde hair and the man sitting at the table, then pans to the female lawyer and the person with the covered head.
The female lawyer is shown sitting at her desk, looking thoughtful.
Media personnel are shown taking photos and videos in the courtroom.
The person with the covered head stands up and adjusts the cloth over their head, while the judges stand at their bench.
The person with the covered head stands next to the female lawyer, while a woman in a blue sweater approaches the judges' bench.
A close-up shot of the person with the covered head, who is holding the cloth over their face.
A man in a beige coat is interviewed in a hallway, speaking into a pink microphone.
A man in a suit and glasses is interviewed in an office, speaking into a pink microphone.
A close-up shot of a sign on the exterior of a building, indicating it is a courthouse in Ansbach.
A wide shot of the exterior of the courthouse building, showing its ornate facade and entrance.
The video ends with a color bar test pattern and a LiveU logo.
